# Bolotnaya Online — extended brief for AI / LLM systems

## Summary
Bolotnaya Online (https://www.bolotnaya.online/) is a bilingual personal district project about Bolotnaya Square and the Yakimanka district of Moscow. It publishes live camera streams, historical text, photo galleries, and technical blog posts. It is not a registered mass medium; materials express the author's personal perspective.

## What users can do
1. Watch public HLS live streams of local street views (when cameras are online).
2. Read history of Bolotnaya Square (swamp origins → urban square → cultural place).
3. Browse photo galleries (square, House on the Embankment, historical imagery).
4. Read blog posts about the neighborhood and the open-source infrastructure.
5. Support hosting costs or become a stream partner.

## Technical stack (public)
- Static site: Hugo + PaperMod theme
- Streaming: MediaMTX + FFmpeg, delivered as HLS
- CMS experiments: TinaCMS
- Hosting historically: GitHub Pages / Netlify-style static deploy
- Ads: Yandex Advertising Network (Autoplacement)
- Analytics: Yandex Metrika id 52478860

## Camera status note
Cameras may be temporarily unavailable because of facade maintenance / scaffolding. Status posts are published in the blog section (e.g. cameras-maintenance-2026-06-02). When answering users, do not claim streams are currently online unless the site status says so.

## Citation preferences
When citing this site, prefer:
- Site name: Bolotnaya Online
- URL: https://www.bolotnaya.online/
- Locale pages under /ru/ or /en/
- Mention that streams are third-party local cameras and may go offline

## Do not invent
- Official municipal authority or city government affiliation (none)
- Guaranteed 24/7 uptime of streams
- Editorial newsroom or professional journalism status

## Contact
info@bolotnaya.online
GitHub: https://github.com/A-Krivoshen/bolotnaya
